title: Naturalis
description: Naturalis is a resource pack aimed at breathing new life into TerraFirmaCraft's flora and fauna.
body:
**Naturalis** is a pack that aims to spice up the foliage within your TerraFirmaCraft worlds.

Version 0.2.1 includes remodels and retextures of all 8 of the basic fruit tree leaves, and reworks all the grain crops.

![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/797421394601836546?style=flat-square&logo=discord&label=Discord&labelColor=white&color=blue)



_![The lifecycle of a cherry tree using Naturalis.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1efcb2af1bc7b410e0bfe9092ba931754ba64e6d.gif)_

_Not tested on 1.18.2_
Please follow the issue tracker link to report problems

Note: This resource pack changes the splashes.txt
